ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "primary_use" TEXT /* Primary usage category of the building (e.g., education, public services) */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the building */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the building was constructed */,
  "floor_count" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the building */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the building's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the building's location */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last energy efficiency inspection */,
  "insulation_type" TEXT /* Type of insulation used in the building */,
  "energy_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meters" (
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meter */,
  "meter_type" TEXT /* Type of meter (e.g., Electricity, Water) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site or building to which the meter is connected */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the meter was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the meter */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the meter */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the meter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meters_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meter_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building associated with the reading */,
  "meter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter recording the reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the reading was taken */,
  "meter_reading" REAL /* Value of the reading (e.g., kWh for electricity) */,
  "reading_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reading (e.g., kWh, m³) */,
  "reading_status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "reading_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_readings_meter_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_id") REFERENCES meters ("meter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meter_readings_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building associated with the conditions */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environmental data was recorded */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "cloud_coverage" TEXT /* Description of cloud coverage (e.g., Clear, Few) */,
  "dew_temperature" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precip_depth_1_hr" REAL /* Precipitation depth in the last hour in mm */,
  "sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Sea level pressure in hPa */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "uv_index" INTEGER /* UV index */,
  "pollutant_levels" TEXT /* Levels of pollutants (e.g., PM2.5, CO2) */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in W/m² */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "site_area" INTEGER /* Total area of the site in square meters */,
  "site_elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "meter_reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meter reading being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_meter_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("meter_reading_id") REFERENCES meter_readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
